source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the figure shown, self-impedances of the two transmission lines are \( 1.5j \, p.u \) each, and \( Z_m = 0.5j \, p.u \) is the mutual impedance. Bus voltages shown in the figure are in p.u. Given that \( \delta > 0 \), the maximum steady-state real power that can be transferred in p.u from Bus-1 to Bus-2 is
